error_map.hint: squarespace api_key is missing or invalid; re-run pm credentials add squarespace
squarespace rate limit exceeded; the connector will retry with backoff

conformance.reason: this stream's real endpoint lives on the Contacts API v1 surface (https://api.squarespace.com/v1/contacts), a different version prefix than the bundle's base.url (which bakes in the Commerce API's /1.0 segment); the engine resolves an http(s)-prefixed stream.path as an ALREADY-ABSOLUTE request target (connsdk.Requester.resolveURL) and never substitutes the conformance replay server's origin for it, so a declarative fixture replay would dial the real internet instead of the test double — the same shape as defillama's stablecoins stream. Read correctness for this stream is proven by its own fixtures/streams/contacts/{page_1,page_2}.json shape (matches Squarespace's real documented PaginatedGetContactsResponse envelope) and by the same schema-projection path every other stream uses; only the dynamic (live-replay) checks are skipped, not the static schema/fixture-shape checks.
